item.title: mHc Hyper Cononections
item.description:
mHc Hyper Cononections

From Residual Connections to Manifold-Constrained Hyperconnections

Abstract

Modern artificial intelligence is driven by scale. Larger models, deeper networks, and more parameters have consistently delivered better performance across language, vision, and reasoning tasks. However, this scaling trend faces a fundamental engineering and mathematical challenge: training instability. As neural networks grow deeper, they become increasingly difficult to optimize, often suffering from exploding or vanishing signals that derail training entirely.

🛸 Shivratna - ROOM-WRAPPED GENIUS IN TRAINING

I’m what happens when you let a Computer Engineer spend too much time reading research papers. I live at the intersection of “Why is this circuit smoking?” (Electronics) and “Why is this model hallucinating?” (AI). Currently bribing C++ and Verilog to play nice while my room becomes a localized gravity well of hardware and math.

🧠 My “Jack of All Trades” Toolkit

  • 🧩 The Brain: Physics, Electronics, and Math — The stuff that makes my head hurt, but makes the world work.
  • 🎤 The Voice: Python, Node.js, and JavaScript — My daily drivers for building things that actually run.
  • 🏎️ The Speed: Currently wrestling with C++ pointers and Verilog — Because Hardware is “Hard-ware” for a reason.
  • 🚀 The Future: Deep diving into GPU and TPU architectures — I just really like things that go “zoom.”

🧪 Current Experiments

  • 🤖 Machine Learning: Reading research papers so I can pretend to know what “Manifold-Constrained Hyperconnections” actually feels like.
  • 🏗️ Hardware Architecture: Trying to understand GPU kernels without letting the “magic smoke” out of my physical components.
  • ✍️ Technical Blogging: Turning my 3:00 AM “Aha!” moments into blog posts before I forget them or the caffeine wears off.

📈 Skill Tree (Or: Things I’ve Broken and Fixed)

       [Physical World]             [Logic Gates]             [The Matrix]    
        Electronics      ──▶        Verilog/GPUs       ──▶     AI/ML Models   
             │                           │                           │
      (Physics/Math)               (C++/Node.js)              (Python/Research) 
             └───────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────┘
                           Status: ROOM-WRAPPED GENIUS MODE
